Layer.GoCommand: %function(self) local score = SCREENMAN:GetTopScreen():GetChild('ScoreP1'):GetChild('ScoreDisplayPercentage Percent'):GetChild('PercentP1'):GetText() score = string.gsub(score,'%%','') score = tonumber(score) if score >= 96 and math.floor(score) ~= 99 then self:queuecommand('Animate') end end

%function(self) local score = SCREENMAN:GetTopScreen():GetChild('ScoreP1'):GetChild('ScoreDisplayPercentage Percent'):GetChild('PercentP1'):GetText() score = string.gsub(score,'%%','') score = tonumber(score) if score >= 99 then self:queuecommand('Animate') end end

%function(self) local score = SCREENMAN:GetTopScreen():GetChild('ScoreP2'):GetChild('ScoreDisplayPercentage Percent'):GetChild('PercentP2'):GetText() score = string.gsub(score,'%%','') score = tonumber(score) if score >= 96 and math.floor(score) ~= 99 then self:queuecommand('Animate') end end

%function(self) local score = SCREENMAN:GetTopScreen():GetChild('ScoreP2'):GetChild('ScoreDisplayPercentage Percent'):GetChild('PercentP2'):GetText() score = string.gsub(score,'%%','') score = tonumber(score) if score >= 99 then self:queuecommand('Animate') end end
